data.title: A field guide for sharper team rituals
data.subtitle: Portrait-format notes for turning recurring meetings into useful operating loops.

sections.headline: Send the decision frame before the meeting
sections.body: Context is cheaper before everyone is in the room. Share the question, options, and owner early.

sections.headline: Separate discovery from decision
sections.body: A meeting gets cleaner when debate, choice, and next action are not treated as the same activity.

sections.headline: Close the loop in the system of record
sections.body: Decisions decay when they live only in chat. Put the owner, deadline, and evidence where work happens.

data.cta: Make the ritual earn its calendar space.
